demo.title: lookgate.sh
demo.code:
# Dry-run first — needs no key, prints the exact vision request
node gate.mjs --image out/art.png --dry-run

# Score an image against the visual-QA rubric -> PASS/FAIL verdict JSON (Gemini vision)
GEMINI_API_KEY=AIza_xxx node gate.mjs \
  --image out/art.png --out verdict.json

# Check against a brand palette + use a score threshold
GEMINI_API_KEY=AIza_xxx node gate.mjs \
  --image out/art.png --palette brandkit.json --threshold 0.8

setup: Node 18+ — uses built-in fetch, zero dependencies (no npm install)
Bring your own Gemini key: export GEMINI_API_KEY (get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey). LOOKGATE_API_KEY is accepted as an alias.
Default provider is Google Gemini vision; target any OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint via --base-url / --model. Verify with `--dry-run` (needs no key) first.
